decisions.briefing: Markets are essentially flat today — S&P 500 unchanged and NASDAQ down just 0.2% — a low-conviction, directionless session heading into month-end. With cash at $477, we're just below the $500 deployment threshold, so no new positions can be initiated even though 4 slots remain open. All 6 existing holdings continue under auto stop-loss (-7%) and profit target (+12%) enforcement.

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted sideways in a quiet, low-volume session as investors positioned cautiously ahead of the July 4th holiday week and end-of-quarter rebalancing. The S&P 500 held flat while the NASDAQ edged slightly lower, suggesting mild rotation out of high-momentum tech names. With no major macro catalysts on deck, institutional activity was subdued and price action remained indecisive.
market_education.summary_zh: 市場在成交量清淡的橫盤走勢中度過，投資者在美國獨立紀念日假期週及季末再平衡前謹慎佈局。標普500指數幾乎平收，納斯達克指數小幅下跌，顯示部分資金從高動能科技股輪出。在缺乏重大宏觀催化劑的情況下，機構操作偏淡，盤面走勢猶疑不定。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance cost of holding uninvested cash in a portfolio. When the market rises, idle cash earns nothing and pulls the portfolio's overall return below a fully-invested benchmark. Today our $477 cash balance sits just under the $500 deployment threshold — we have 4 open position slots but cannot act until cash replenishes, meaning we're accepting a small drag on upside potential.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 現金拖累是指投資組合中持有未動用現金所導致的績效損耗。當市場上漲時，閒置現金無法參與獲利，使組合報酬低於滿倉基準。今日帳上現金為$477，略低於$500的部署門檻，雖有四個空倉位卻無法行動，意味著我們暫時承受少量的上行錯失風險，需等待現金回補後方可再次出擊。
